---
title: "Crop Yield"
output: html_notebook
---

# Import libraries
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(cobalt)
library(WeightIt)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
```

# Task 1
```{r}
farm_df <- read.csv("farms.csv")
```

# Task 2
```{r}
head(farm_df)
```

# Task 3
```{r}
bal.plot(farm_df$cover_10, farm_df$age_avg, 
         xlab = "Cover crop use", 
         ylab = "Average age",
         main = "Age balance plot")
```

# Task 4
```{r}
bal.plot(farm_df$cover_10, farm_df$region, 
         xlab = "Cover crop use", 
         ylab = "Region",
         main = "Region balance plot")
```

# Task 5
```{r}
bal.tab(cover_10 ~ region + total_avg + age_avg + experience_avg + 
          insurance_avg + easement_p + conservation_till_avg + fertilizer_per_area,
        data = farm_df,
        un = TRUE)
```

# Task 6
```{r}
farm_iptw <- weightit(cover_10 ~ region + total_avg + insurance_avg + fertilizer_per_area,
                      data = farm_df,
                      method = "iptw",
                      estimand = "ATE")
```

# Task 7
```{r}
love.plot(farm_iptw, binary = "smd", thresholds = c(m = .1))
```

# Task 8
```{r}
farm_iptw2 <- weightit(cover_10 ~ region + total_avg + age_avg + experience_avg + 
                         easement_p + conservation_till_avg,
                       data = farm_df,
                       method = "iptw",
                       estimand = "ATE")
```

# Task 9
```{r}
love.plot(farm_iptw2, binary = "smd", thresholds = c(m = .1))
```

# Task 10
```{r}
love.plot(farm_iptw2, stats = "ps", abs = FALSE)
```

# Task 11
```{r}
yield_mod <- lm(total_yield ~ cover_10 + region + total_avg + age_avg + 
                  experience_avg + easement_p + conservation_till_avg,
                data = farm_df,
                weights = farm_iptw2$weights)
```

# Task 12
```{r}
coeftest(yield_mod, vcov = vcovHC(yield_mod, type = "HC1"))
```

# Task 13
The coefficient on `cover_10` is the estimated effect of cover crop adoption on wheat yield in bushels per acre, after weighting and adjustment. If it is positive, counties with at least 10% cover-crop use are associated with higher wheat yields; if negative, the association is lower yields.
